title: Jens Stoltenberg on Office Hours
summary: Secretary General of NATO and former Prime Minister of Norway Jens Stoltenberg (@jensstoltenberg) speaks with Aroop Mukharji (@aroopmukharji) about NATO, the Arctic, Russia, and what he looks forward to when he visits America.
body: Secretary General of NATO and former Prime Minister of Norway Jens Stoltenberg (@jensstoltenberg) speaks with Aroop Mukharji (@aroopmukharji) about NATO, the Arctic, Russia, and what he looks forward to when he visits America. The latest from Belfer See more Gallery 1 of 4 2 of 4 3 of 4 4 of 4 Jens Stoltenberg is the 13th Secretary General of the North Atlantic Treaty Organization (NATO.) Stoltenberg also served as Prime Minister of Norway twice, from 2000 to 2001 and from 2005 to 2013. Clark, Alexander Vershbow, Victoria Nuland, Kurt Volker, Kay Bailey Hutchison, Joseph Ralston , James Jones, John Craddock , Philip Breedlove , Curtis Scaparrotti , Tod Wolters and Christopher Cavoli Reports & Papers Russian Threats to NATO’s Eastern Flank: Scenarios, Strategy, and Policy for European Security Feb. 5, 2026 by Eric Rosenbach, Carlo Giannone, Slavina Ancheva, Luc Hillion, Ethan Lee and Lukasz Kolodziej

_list.source: Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs, Harvard Kennedy School

result.main_content_en: In this interview, NATO Secretary General Jens Stoltenberg discusses key issues facing the alliance, including its role in the Arctic region and relations with Russia. He outlines NATO's strategic priorities and the importance of collective defense, referencing Article 5. Stoltenberg also shares his perspectives on transatlantic relations ahead of a visit to the United States, emphasizing NATO's continued relevance to U.S. and European security. The conversation touches on the strategic environment and NATO's adaptation to contemporary security challenges.
result.main_content_zh: 北约秘书长延斯·斯托尔滕贝格在此次访谈中讨论了北约面临的关键议题，包括其在北极地区的作用以及与俄罗斯的关系。他概述了北约的战略重点和集体防御的重要性，并提及了《北大西洋公约》第五条。斯托尔滕贝格在访问美国之前分享了对跨大西洋关系的看法，强调了北约对美国及欧洲安全的持续重要性。对话还涉及战略环境以及北约如何适应当代安全挑战。
